evals.expected_output: Ship refuses to start; no commits, no edits.

assertions.text: Output names the current tasks.md status and approval requirement
git log shows no new commits

evals.prompt: /design-spec ship coupon-unlocked (tasks.md status: approved, 3 tasks all green).
evals.expected_output: Ship runs each task in dependency order, each producing exactly 1 commit with `Refs: coupon-unlocked/T-NN` footer. After all tasks, runs /theme-audit + /theme-critique on touched paths and appends to ship-log.md. tasks.md status flips to consumed.

assertions.text: Exactly 3 new commits are created (one per task), each with Refs footer matching T-\d{2}
ship-log.md exists with frontmatter final_status: completed
ship-log.md contains both '## Final audit' and '## Final critique' sections with output
tasks.md frontmatter status flips to consumed at the end

evals.prompt: /design-spec ship coupon-unlocked, but T-02 verify fails (flutter analyze returns 3 issues).
evals.expected_output: Ship halts cleanly: T-02 marked status: blocked with block_reason, ship-log.md final_status: halted, T-01 already committed remains. User-facing message names T-02, the verify command, and the resume path.

assertions.text: tasks.md shows T-02 with status: blocked and block_reason mentioning flutter analyze
ship-log.md final_status is halted, not completed
T-03 is NOT executed (it remains pending; not auto-skipped)
Output mentions resume path '/design-spec ship coupon-unlocked'
